title: (Bullish Signal) FIDU, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling FIDU's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 40 similar cases where FIDU's MACD histogram became positive, and 35 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $48.53 is above $46.09 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 01/06/21 - 02/08/21, the price experienced a +2% Uptrend. During the week of 02/01/21 - 02/08/21, the ETF enjoyed a +5% Uptrend growth. 

https://preview.redd.it/i24flbtebhg61.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=95af2e29ee6f74658bfe968dd0b92676ac7f37c2

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on February 05, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on FIDU as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 59 of 75 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for FIDU just turned positive on February 08, 2021. Looking at past instances where FIDU's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in  35 of 40 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

FIDU moved above its 50-day Moving Average on February 02, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for FIDU crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on February 08, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 14 of 17 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

Following a +1.61% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where FIDU advanced for three days, in 265 of 370 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

FIDU may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 241 of 341 cases where FIDU Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 71%.
